CREATE TABLE h3_data (id UInt64, h3_index UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT h3ToGeoBoundary(h3_index) AS coordinates FROM h3_data;
SELECT h3ToGeoBoundary(h3_index) AS coordinates FROM h3_data WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, h3_index, h3ToGeoBoundary(h3_index) AS coordinates FROM h3_data WHERE h3_index > 644325524701193960;
WITH (SELECT MAX(h3_index) FROM h3_data) AS max_index SELECT h3ToGeoBoundary(max_index) AS boundary_coordinates;
CREATE TABLE geo_data (region String, h3_index UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY region;
SELECT g.region, h3ToGeoBoundary(g.h3_index) AS boundary FROM geo_data g JOIN h3_data h ON g.h3_index = h.h3_index;
SELECT h3ToGeoBoundary(h3_index), COUNT(*) FROM h3_data GROUP BY h3_index;
SELECT h3ToGeoBoundary(h3_index) FROM (SELECT h3_index FROM h3_data WHERE id IN (1, 2)) AS filtered_h3;
CREATE TABLE nested_data AS SELECT h3_index FROM h3_data WHERE id = 1;
SELECT n.h3_index, h3ToGeoBoundary(n.h3_index) FROM nested_data n;
SELECT h3ToGeoBoundary(h3_index) FROM h3_data WHERE h3_index IN (SELECT h3_index FROM geo_data WHERE region = 'RegionA');
WITH (SELECT h3_index FROM h3_data ORDER BY h3_index LIMIT 1) AS smallest_index SELECT h3ToGeoBoundary(smallest_index) AS boundary_coordinates;
